arts.ttl: Callum McGregor reacts to 'backhanded' Rangers compliment as code to crack Celtic skipper leaves rivals wanting
arts.sum: It’s the same old simple theory and it feels as if it’s trotted out before every derby these d

arts.ttl: Clement thought he had leeway with Rangers fans but Celtic can leave boss in untenable position after being sold a pup
arts.sum: The Belgian faces a do-or-die derby day showdown at Ibrox

arts.ttl: Rangers standout sends heartfelt message as he insists the family’s not for breaking up
arts.sum: Vaclav Cerny has been one of the few decent performers in Govan this season and he had something he wanted to get off his chest

arts.ttl: Celtic captain Callum McGregor reveals his Rangers game 'chaos' theory
arts.sum: Celtic captain Callum McGregor has revealed his Rangers game "chaos" theory ahead of the Premiership match at Ibrox tomorrow afternoon.

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor admits what Rangers did in League Cup final that Celtic didn't despite Hampden triumph
arts.sum: Skipper McGregor has admitted his side were unable to control the chaos in the penalty shootout win in the League Cup Final - and is determined to avoid a repeat at Ibrox

arts.ttl: Big update dropped on Nicolas Kuhn Celtic contract amid Premier League transfer chatter
arts.sum: Kuhn is one of Celtic’s top providers and has certainly been the best player thus far but with that run of form brings unwanted interest from clubs with deep pockets. Nicolas Kuhn could sign a new Celtic contract

arts.ttl: What we spotted from Celtic's final training session before Rangers clash
arts.sum: Some fringe players were in action alongside the big-hitters at Celtic we can expect to start against Rangers tomorrow. Brendan Rodgers may have taken a step back from coaching but his staff put the squad through their paces on the Lennoxtown training pitch this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Vaclav Cerny insists Rangers boss Philippe Clement got squad rotation right as winger declares he WAS tired
arts.sum: The winger was notably benched during the disappointing display against Motherwell

arts.ttl: Jack Butland will miss Old Firm derby due to ‘a significant bleed’ to his leg
arts.sum: The 31-year-old England international was admitted to hospital and is now recovering at home.

arts.ttl: Celtic January transfer wishlist: Two returning heroes, striker arrives and window closes without key exit
arts.sum: The Celtic manager has cash in the bank to spend with an already deep squad of players leading the way in the Scottish Premiership title “race”. January transfer window closes without Cameron Carter-Vickers exit
